summary: Completed testing of Pet Soul Integration Phase 2 - FitPage and AdvisoryPage. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend pages load correctly with all UI elements. Pet Soul integration code is correctly implemented.
critical_code_review_comments: FitPage.jsx correctly implements Pet Soul write to /api/pet-vault/{pet_id}/record-fit-activity after successful form submission (Lines 189-206)
AdvisoryPage.jsx correctly implements Pet Soul write to /api/pet-vault/{pet_id}/record-advisory-consult after successful form submission (Lines 194-214)
Both pages show 'Activity/Consultation will be saved to Pet Soul' message when pet is selected (FitPage Line 613, AdvisoryPage Line 653)
Backend endpoints correctly return 404 for invalid pet IDs
Pet Soul writes are non-blocking - errors are caught and logged but don't break the main flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pet Soul Integration Phase 2 complete for FitPage and AdvisoryPage. Both pages have pet selector UI and Pet Soul write calls after successful form submission. The pets collection is empty so the Pet Soul selector won't show pets, but the code path is in place and will work when users have registered pets.

fit_page_pet_soul_integration.pet_soul_message: Activity will be saved to {pet_name}'s Pet Soul (Line 613)

advisory_page_pet_soul_integration.pet_soul_message: Consultation will be saved to {pet_name}'s Pet Soul (Line 653)

verification_summary.fit_page_loads: VERIFIED - Hero section, fitness type buttons, featured programs all visible
verification_summary.advisory_page_loads: VERIFIED - Hero section, advisory type buttons, stats all visible
verification_summary.pet_soul_fit_endpoint_404: VERIFIED - Returns 404 'Pet not found' for invalid pet IDs
verification_summary.pet_soul_advisory_endpoint_404: VERIFIED - Returns 404 'Pet not found' for invalid pet IDs
verification_summary.pet_soul_message_code: VERIFIED - Both pages have the message display code when pet is selected

api_tests_results.fit_request: PASS - Creates request with request_id and ticket_id
api_tests_results.advisory_request: PASS - Creates request with request_id and ticket_id
